content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于12月19日17:30(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年1月2日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、活动
【精选礼盒：新品上架】
● 12 月 22 日 9:00 - 1 月 26日 9:00 期间，以下精选礼盒限时上架：
    ○ 银霜祈愿箱：自选道具组合礼包，可固定获得「特批药剂」×20，「冬渡节的礼券」×1，并从如下道具中任选 2 项，可重复选择：
        ■ 「精粹灵核碎片」×5、「灵核碎片」×15、「追念羽笔」×200、「贤者之石」×2、「群星余梦」×50、「碎裂余梦」×200、「拟态凝晶」×450、「灵知制剂Ⅲ」×450、「蔷薇金券」×4500000。
        ■ 购买价格：「源液」×688，上架期间仅限购买 5 次。
    ○ 冬渡礼物盒：自选道具组合礼包，可固定获得「流明之芯」×30，「姜饼派对的请柬」×1，并从如下道具中任选 3 项，可重复选择：
        ■ 「精粹灵核碎片」×15、「灵核碎片」×45、「追念羽笔」×600、「贤者之石」×6、「群星余梦」×150、「碎裂余梦」×600、「拟态凝晶」×1350、「灵知制剂Ⅲ」×1350、「蔷薇金券」×13500000。
        ■ 购买价格：「源液」×2688，上架期间仅限购买 3 次。
    ○ 「冬渡节的礼券」：使用后可从以下对战表情中任选一个获得：冬渡弥萨格「卡斯托尔·冬渡节快乐」、冬渡弥萨格「波吕克斯·给你礼物」、冬渡弥萨格「诞妄·墨菲·袜子」、冬渡弥萨格「法洛思·发光」、冬渡弥萨格「卡茜亚·扔」。
    ○ 「姜饼派对的请柬」：使用后可从以下头像中任选一个获得：「姜饼派对·杜勒赛因」、「姜饼派对·凯刻斯」、「姜饼派对·奥尔拉」。
 
二、综合
【课题纪录】
● 购买「高级课题」和「核心课题」界面中增加了明确的本期持续时间及特殊规则说明：课题持续周期通常为 28 天，有时会只持续 14 天。直接激活与升级核心课题所需源液从 1280/780 降低为 980/390，对应额外获得的银芯 从 1460/780 降低为 1070/390。持续 14 天的课题会标注本期课题经验翻倍来进行弥补，因此请注意高级课题价格仍然为 680 源液不变。
● 这项调整能够使得特殊周期的核心课题定价更加合理。我们将会在版本更新后 24 小时内为过往直接激活与升级过 14 天核心课题的守密人补发与价格调整相差的源液。
 
【一般】
● 「繁衍狂欢」完成后，现在会停留在当前界面，而不是返回大厅界面。
● 「对战表情」的名称移除了系列名前缀，现在更加精简。
 
三、优化和问题修复
● 修复了「融灾禁区」重置阵容后继续编队时会出现点击命轮详情无响应的问题。
● 修复了「战斗」中的威胁提示数值在获得护盾后立即结束回合时没有正确更新的问题。
● 修复了「繁衍狂热」重新登录后可能会出现新提示异常的问题。
● 修复了「编队」中使用助战时可能会使队伍中出现三个界域唤醒体的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「拉蒙娜」的生日邮件标题文本错误问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「环行·拉蒙娜」生日邮件正文文本错误的问题。
● 修复了「课题」奖励界面中，右侧道具列表显示错误白色装饰线的问题。
● 修复了「弥萨格商店」预览礼包详情时，弹窗和货币栏底图细节显示不佳的问题。
 
四、本地化
【英语】
● 所有唤醒体的「繁衍狂欢」故事已经由人工完成翻译。
● 修复了「编队」界面的「禁忌学识等级」属性描述文本中，三种「研究深度」数值未能正确显示的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「哈姆林」的狂气爆发描述中错误显示了代码文本的问题。
● 修复了敌人「觉者」的意图「攻势推演」描述中错误显示了代码文本的问题。
● 修复了 5 处技能描述中「消耗」和衍生卡「领航」的翻译措辞不统一的问题。
● 修复了 7 处技能、命轮描述中「伤害提升」、「护盾提升」翻译措辞不统一的问题。
● 修复了 7 处技能、命轮描述中「超维回合」翻译措辞不统一的问题。
● 修复了 R 命轮描述中「使装备者的维度影像造物出现的可能性提高 100％」效果翻译措辞不统一的问题。
● 修复了星辰篇规则「棱彩透镜」描述翻译不准确的问题。
● 修复了 22 处剧情文本中的拼写、格式换行问题。
● 修复了 15 处战斗中技能、造物描述翻译不准确的问题。

**V2.4.0.12 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on December 19 at 17:30(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on January 2, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
1. Event
[Selected Giftboxes: New Arrivals]
● From December 22 at 9:00 to January 26 at 9:00, the following selected giftboxes will be available for a limited time:
    ○ Silver Frost Prayer Box: A customizable item combination gift pack, guaranteed to receive "Special Potion Supply" ×20, "Solstice Gift Ticket" ×1, and choose 2 items from the following list, with the option to select the same item multiple times:
        ■  "Refined Gnosis Fragment" ×5, "Gnosis Fragment" ×15, "Remembrance Quill" ×200, "Aetheric Stone" ×2, "Dreamspark" ×50, "Dreamshard" ×200, "Mimetic Crystal" ×450, "Gnosis Elixir III" ×450, "Rose Scrip" ×4500000.
        ■  Purchase price: "Silver Prime" ×688, limited to 5 purchases during the listing period.
    ○ Solstice Giftbox: A customizable item combination gift pack that guarantees "Luminous Core" ×30 and "Gingerbread Party Invitation" ×1, and allows you to choose 3 items from the following options, with repeats allowed:
        ■  "Refined Gnosis Fragment" ×15, "Gnosis Fragment" ×45, "Remembrance Quill" ×600, "Aetheric Stone" ×6, "Dreamspark" ×150, "Dreamshard" ×600, "Mimetic Crystal" ×1350, "Gnosis Elixir III" ×1350, "Rose Scrip" ×13,500,000.
        ■  Purchase price: "Silver Prime" ×2688, limited to 3 purchases during the sale period.
    ○ "Solstice Gift Ticket": After use, you can choose one from the following Traphase Emotes: Solstice Mythag "Castor - Happy Solstice Passage", Solstice Mythag "Pollux - A Gift for You", Solstice Mythag "Murphy: Fauxborn - Socks", Solstice Mythag "Faros - Glowing", Solstice Mythag "Casiah - Throw".
    ○ "Invitation to the Gingerbread Party": After use, you can choose one of the following avatars: "Gingerbread Party: Doresain", "Gingerbread Party: Caecus", "Gingerbread Party: Horla".

2. Summary
[Curriculum]
● The interface for purchasing "Advanced Topics" and "Premium Topics" has been updated to clearly indicate the current duration and special rules: the typical duration for topics is usually 28 days, but it may sometimes last only 14 days. The Silver Prime required for directly activating and upgrading Premium Topics has been reduced from 1280/780 to 980/390, with the corresponding additional Silver obtained reduced from 1460/780 to 1070/390. Topics lasting 14 days will be marked with a note indicating double Topic EXP for compensation, so please note that the price for Advanced Topics remains unchanged at 680 Silver Prime.
● This adjustment will make the pricing of premium topics during special periods more reasonable. We will compensate Keepers who directly activated and upgraded premium topics 14 days prior to the version update with the difference in Silver Prime within 24 hours after the update.

[Normal]
● After completing "Reproduction Frenzy," you will now stay on the current screen instead of returning to the lobby screen.
● The name of the "Traphase Emote" has had the series prefix removed, making it more concise.

3. Optimization and Problem Fix
● Fixed the issue where clicking on Wheel of Destiny details would become unresponsive after resetting the lineup in the "D-Effect Zone."
● Fixed the issue where the threat indicator in "Combat" did not update correctly when the turn ended immediately after gaining Shield.
● Fixed the issue where a new prompt anomaly may occur after relogging with "Reproduction Frenzy."
● Fixed an issue where using assists in the "Lineup" could result in having three Awakeners from different Realms in the team.
● Fixed the text error in the birthday email title for Awakener "Ramona."
● Fixed the issue with the incorrect text in the birthday email body for the Awakener "Ramona: Timeworn".
● Fixed the issue where the right side item list displayed an incorrect white decorative line in the "Topic" reward interface.
● Fixed the issue where the popup and the currency bar background details were not displayed properly when previewing the gift package details in the "Mythag Shop".

4. Localization
● Fixed the issue where the values for the three "Research Depth" attributes were not displayed correctly in the "Forbidden Lore Level" description text on the "Lineup" interface.
● Fixed the issue where the description of the Awakener "Hameln" incorrectly displayed code text in the Exalt.
● Fixed the issue where the intention description "Assault Thesis" of the enemy "Perceiver" incorrectly displayed code text.
● Fixed the inconsistency in the translation wording of "Exhaust" and the Derived Card "Pilot" in 5 skill descriptions.
● Fixed 7 inconsistencies in the translation wording of "DMG increase" and "Shield Generation" in the descriptions of Skills and Wheels of Destiny.
● Fixed the inconsistency in the translation wording of "Ultra Round" in 7 Skill and Wheel of Destiny descriptions.
● Fixed the inconsistency in the translation wording of the effect "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%" in the description of the R Wheels of Destiny.
● Fixed the issue where the description translation of the "Prismatic Lens" in Astral Reign rules was inaccurate.
● Fixed 22 spelling and formatting line break issues in the story text.
● Fixed 15 instances of inaccurate translations for Skill and Relic descriptions in combat.
● Human translated all Awakeners' "Reproduction Frenzy" stories.
● (Newly human translated "Reproduction Frenzy" stories: Ramona, Ramona: Timeworn, Doll, Doll: Inferno, Lotan, Ogier, Tawil, Ryker, Hameln, Nautila, Pandia, Alva, Goliath, Caecus, Tulu, Thais, Sorel, Salvador, Uvhash, Leigh, Liz, Daffodil, Clementine, Wanda, Faros, Sanga, Aurita, Celeste, Corposant, Aigis, Helot, Helot: Catena, Agrippa, Faint, Erica, Jenkin, Tinct, Casiah, Winkle, Horla, Karen, Nymphaea, Lily, 24.)
<@633215996508766229> 一个头像到底凭什么卖268，你把你冯算进去了？😅
笑拉了，68一个表情，268一个头像🤣😂😅😭
没觉得这个礼包定价太高了吗一个头像你卖我268块人民币？一个表情卖我68块人民币？？我是厨子也不是这样薅的啊？？
<@633215996508766229> 我是厨子也不是给你这样薅钱的吧？一个头像268块一个表情68块？（这还没算汇率）然后再给点时尚小垃圾？你自己想想这合理吗？
我感觉怎么买都有点亏麻了的感觉<:thinking1:1356068128936820929>
